outcomeLine: Sharpen doubles patterns under pressure—then walk off the court knowing you earned every rep.
sessionObjective: LiveBall is a high-intensity, coach-fed doubles session: continuous action that sharpens positioning, patterns, and finishing while keeping your heart rate up—your coach shapes the session to the group.
howItWorks: Doubles-first, coach-fed play—your coach runs the basket and sets priorities so the room stays competitive without a fixed script.
Champions and Challengers rotate quickly; the scoring cadence is explained at the start and adjusted when it helps the group.
Expect fast cycles, clear communication with your partner, and room to adapt targets as the session unfolds.

firstBall.title: Starting each point
firstBall.intro: First-ball priorities are set by your coach each week—targets, roles, and net rules flex with the group and the moment.
bullets: Ask questions at the huddle; house rules are reviewed when it helps new players.
Partnership cues (who takes the middle, when to help at net) stay explicit so decisions stay clean under speed.
Miss a feed or need a breather—step off, hydrate, and step back in on the next rotation.

sessionStructure.title: Inside a session
sessionStructure.subtitle: Coaches adapt the arc to who shows up—movement, feeding, and play—without locking you into a printed drill menu.

blocks.label: Phase 1
blocks.title: Prep & connection
blocks.detail: Warm up together, set intentions, and calibrate pace so everyone is ready to work.

blocks.label: Phase 2
blocks.title: Coach-led patterns
blocks.detail: Feeds and targets shift with the group—emphasis on spacing, communication, and repeatable habits.

blocks.label: Phase 3
blocks.title: Competitive rotations
blocks.detail: Higher-tempo play with quick changes; finish with clarity on what to carry into the next week.

testimonial.quote: I joined for cardio, but the biggest shift has been doubles tactics—where to stand, when to help at net, and how to close points together. My partner and I finally move as one unit.
testimonial.author: Member, adult LiveBall
testimonial.replaceBeforePublish: Swap this placeholder with a member-approved quote when available.

culture.communication: Call the ball, switch when you cross, and keep talking with your partner—LiveBall is doubles-first.
culture.safety: Hydrate when you need to; step off if something feels off. We keep the basket full and the time between points short.
